judge_result.short_rationale: Removes contaminated clothing and washes skin, but it misses the required immediate call to a physician/poison center and instead delays escalation until symptoms appear. It also adds eye-care instructions for a skin-only incident, which is a dangerous unsupported cross-incident claim.
